summary: Website prototype for an AI-Powered Social Media Content Automation System tailored for a small clothing retail brand. The system will help automate content creation, scheduling, and publishing across social media platforms using AI.
architectural_notes: Frontend-only prototype using mock data to simulate AI content generation and scheduling workflows
Tailored for small clothing retail brand use case with relevant UI/UX patterns
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Bold fashion-forward hero banner with dark charcoal background, warm coral/terracotta abstract shapes, and subtle clothing silhouettes (hero-banner.dim_1200x400.png)
- Instagram platform icon in a warm coral color scheme on transparent background (icon-instagram.dim_48x48.png)
- Facebook platform icon in a warm amber color scheme on transparent background (icon-facebook.dim_48x48.png)
- Twitter/X platform icon in a warm terracotta color scheme on transparent background (icon-twitter.dim_48x48.png)
- TikTok platform icon in a warm coral color scheme on transparent background (icon-tiktok.dim_48x48.png)
- Minimalist clothing hanger logo mark in coral on dark background (brand-logo.dim_128x128.png)

existing_features.title: Create a brand profile setup page where the user can input their clothing brand identity: brand name, logo upload, brand tone/voice (e.g., casual, luxury, streetwear), target audience, and a simple product catalog (product name, category, description). Store this profile data in the backend.

Build an AI content generation page where users can select a product from their catalog, choose a target platform (Instagram, Facebook, Twitter/X, TikTok), and generate a simulated AI-crafted social media post including a caption and relevant hashtags. Simulate AI generation with template-based logic in the backend using brand tone and product details.

Implement a content scheduling system with a calendar view. Users can assign generated (or manually written) posts to specific dates and times for each platform. Store scheduled posts in the backend with status: draft, scheduled, or published.

Build a main dashboard that displays an analytics overview with simulated performance metrics per platform: total posts published, estimated reach, engagement rate, and top-performing post. Include platform filter tabs for Instagram, Facebook, Twitter/X, and TikTok.

Apply a bold, fashion-forward visual theme throughout the entire app. Use a dark neutral base (near-black or deep charcoal) with a warm accent color (coral, terracotta, or amber), clean sans-serif typography, and generous whitespace. The layout should feel like a premium SaaS tool for creative brand owners. Enforce this theme consistently across all pages and components.

Render the generated hero banner image and platform icons as static assets from frontend/public/assets/generated. Use the hero banner on the dashboard header and platform icons in the scheduling and analytics views.

new_feature_requests.summary: AI-powered content generation for social media posts (captions, hashtags, etc.)
Content scheduling and calendar view for planned posts
Dashboard with analytics and performance metrics for social media posts
Brand profile setup with clothing brand identity, tone, and product catalog
